title: The Traitor's Gate
synopsis: After the Gilded Crossroads, suspicion fractures Mira Eggwarden's alliance. A dormant Riftborn egg pulls the team toward the Traitor's Gate — an ancient fortress that judges identity, bond, and intent. False accusations, memory mirrors, and a Meridian siege force impossible choices before a sealed road opens toward the Forge of Rifts. Cael Vesper, coerced by the Meridian's captivity of Lumenhare, confesses and turns against his handlers. Trust is not instantly restored.

False accusations, memory mirrors, and a Meridian siege force impossible choices before a sealed road opens toward the Forge of Rifts.
